//: Abide: treat .abide components as Svelte for syntax highlighting (the grammar is near-identical). The Svelte language server is disabled here because it would parse .abide as .svelte and emit bogus diagnostics; real type-checking comes from the abide language server (see editors/zed/abide). Once that extension is installed, it registers its own 'Abide' language and you can drop the file_types override.
